items.title: If math is right Khris Middleton's 2026-27 salary will be exactly $5,591,122 - the most he can make and still fit with Ayton into the Olynyk TPE. Fun times!
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: If math is right Khris Middleton's 2026-27 salary will be exactly $5,591,122 - the most he can make and still fit with Ayton into the Olynyk TPE. Fun times!

items.title: Looks like Wizards salary dump of Russell into the megatrade lets Wizards take both Ayton and Middleton into Olynyk TPE that expires in 48 hours, and then create two new 6.0M exceptions for Jaden Hardy and Russell. Russell is Griz's 20th contract and presumably headed for buyout.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: Looks like Wizards salary dump of Russell into the megatrade lets Wizards take both Ayton and Middleton into Olynyk TPE that expires in 48 hours, and then create two new 6.0M exceptions for Jaden Hardy and Russell. Russell is Griz's 20th contract and presumably headed for buyout.

items.title: [Koreen] Canada Basketball has announced that NBA MVP Shai Gilgeous-Alexander will be among those playing for Canada this coming weekend (along with NAW, Brooks, Nembhard brothers)... Several players are with the team but won't play, including Dort, Mathurin, Barrett, Edey, Powell, Olynyk
